name: Silicon City
short_description: Silicon City is a new take on the classic city builder genre, where each citizen voice their opinion. Will you be an urban designer, a rural evangelist or a reckless capitalist? Build your way to the most productive city until elected as the best mayor or plan the city of your dreams in sandbox.
detailed_description:
Welcome to Silicon City

A fresh and innovative perspective on the classic city-building genre, where every citizen matters and has a say.
As the mayor of a new city, you are in charge of its overall development and you can rely on modern tools to make it pleasant for your citizens and get re-elected.
They'll let you know when they're unhappy with your policies, and if you don't listen, they may just pack up and leave. And let's face it, without them, your city will be a lonely, empty place.

Do you have what it takes to become the ultimate mayor of Silicon City? With a huge range of features and gameplay mechanics, this game is perfect for anyone who loves simulation, or city-building games. Whether you're a seasoned gamer or a newcomer to the genre, you'll find plenty to love in Silicon City.

Play it the classic way:

In Silicon City, you'll start with an empty land and some money to layout a small village and welcome a growing population of citizens who all have unique needs and desires. As it grows into a city, you'll need to balance your budget and manage your resources carefully to ensure that everyone is happy and thriving.
With more than 50 unique buildings to construct, there's always something new and exciting to discover in Silicon City. And thanks to procedurally generated content, the possibilities are virtually endless!

Play in sandbox:

Plan the city of your dreams with infinite money. Write your own scenario with access to all the commands and functions in game. Customize, mod and share your creations with your community!

What Silicon City has to offer:

  • Unique and independant citizens
  • Procedurally generated buildings
  • Lots of data and an integrated social network to analyse your city
  • Twitch integration that lets your viewers become citizens in your game
  • A fun and friendly tone that makes the game accessible to everyone

Let's go!

Ready to take on the challenge of Silicon City?
Download the game now and start building the metropolis of your dreams. With so much to discover and explore, you'll never get bored of this unique and engaging city-building game.

About the team

This is the first game made and published by Polycorne, an independant game dev studio located in the French Alps. We love to have the feedback of our players, don't hesitate to contact us via discord to tell us your thoughts about Silicon City.
